summary: Domain Isolation Implemented: Designed a decoupled domain model separating volatile redirection caching from relational entities. Infrastructure Provisioned: Configured and initialized a local testing stack using Docker Compose, creating an isolated network space for Postgres and Redis. Guardrails Verified: Checked and logged data schemas, indexes, and process connection ceilings, passing all production readiness pre-checks.
evidence: Schema initialization confirmed with partial unique index idx_links_active_code (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) for O(1) routing lookups and safe short-code recycling
Analytics tracking schema confirmed with idx_click_events_link_id foreign key index to prevent namespace collisions
Postgres running with max_connections=100 resource capacity limit enforced
